name: 811 Dream Different Credit Card

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 500 bonus Reward Points (worth ₹50) on spending ₹5,000 within the first 45 days of card setup

additionalBenefits: Interest-free cash withdrawals for up to 48 days (subject to ₹100 processing fee)
Credit limit up to 90% of your fixed deposit amount
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between ₹500 and ₹4,000 (max ₹3,500 per year)
Railway surcharge waiver on irctc.co.in and counter bookings (max ₹500 per year)
additionalDetails: Reward Points can be redeemed for brand e-vouchers or travel bookings via the Kotak Rewards portal at a rate of 1 Reward Point = ₹0.10.
Reward Points can also be redeemed as statement credit (cashback) at a rate of 1 Reward Point = ₹0.07.

A minimum of 2,00,000 Reward Points is not required; a minimum of 2,000 Reward Points is required for statement credit (cashback) redemptions, and a minimum of 300 Reward Points is required for vouchers.
Effective April 1, 2026, the milestone program offering ₹750 cashback has been discontinued.

voucherRedemptions.programme: Flight & hotel bookings via Kotak Rewards

salaried: No income proof or CIBIL score checks required
selfEmployed: No income proof or CIBIL score checks required

internalNotes: Redemption rate for vouchers and merchandise is 1 point = ₹0.10. Cash statement credit rate is devalued to 1 point = ₹0.07. Spends on utility, education, wallet loading, government, insurance, gaming, fuel, and rent do not count towards milestone benefits. The anniversary milestone program of ₹750 cashback has been discontinued effective April 1, 2026.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
